utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes entries for all 7. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 2) travel_dates: Provided (August 1-5, 2024) – specific dates – complete. 3) transportation: Should be flight details with costs. Provided: 'Budget Airline, Economy Class for 4 people, estimated cost: €500' – lacks specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, times), but does include a cost; however, the requirement says flight details with costs, so specificity is missing. Not fully specified. 4) accommodation: 'Adventure Lodge (One-star, 5 nights for 4 people), cost: €275' – has hotel name, star level, duration, party size, and cost – reasonably complete. 5) activities: Selected activities with costs – three activities each with cost – complete. 6) additional_services: 'Remaining budget for Food & Other Expenses: €645' – includes extra services with costs – acceptable. 7) total_budget: '€1,700 (Flights: €500 + Accommodation: €275 + Activities: €280 + Food & Other Expenses: €645)' – complete breakdown – complete. Therefore, 6 of 7 are fully specified; transportation is under-specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package, the identifiable items that have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings are: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation 'Budget Airline, Economy Class'; accommodation 'Adventure Lodge'; and activities 'City Walking Tour' and 'Zoo'. 'Indoor Trampoline Park' and generic budget/food notes do not have entries in the ground-truth set, so they are omitted. I map each included item to its exact ground-truth rating.
